description: The team gathers at a diner, enjoying a rare calm moment and reflecting on being together again, even as uncertainty looms. Their peace is shattered when soldiers arrive and deploy a freezing device, capturing them as the lights go out. The scene closes with the team's fate uncertain, ending on a suspenseful note.

transcript.line: Anybody have room for some pie? Okay, so we have apple, strawberry, rhubarb, and chocolate banana cream.
Yep, that's me. You got us. Nice job. And hey, congrats on the whole power-outage thing. It was very ominous.
the window closes in less than two minutes. Take them.
All right, Phil, enough sight-seeing. Get back to work.
